forecast.name: This Afternoon
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny. High near 51, with temperatures falling to around 45 in the afternoon. Southwest wind around 5 mph.

forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.shortForecast: Partly Cloudy then Areas Of Fog
forecast.detailedForecast: Areas of fog after midnight. Partly cloudy, with a low around 28. Southwest wind around 6 mph.

weather_report:
As the afternoon gently unfolds over Boston, a resplendent clarity envelops the city, hinting at brighter days ahead. The sun casts its warm embrace upon the earth, nudging temperatures towards a modest high of 51, but a cool breeze is already filtering through, dropping them slightly as day melds into night. Locals might find themselves unwinding amidst the amiable glow, perhaps indulging in a leisurely stroll along the Charles River or exploring hidden corners of their favorite local haunts before the sunlight bids adieu.

As twilight approaches, the promise of fog awaits, closing in after midnight. The air will cool to a brisk 28, suggesting that a light jacket or a cozy sweater would serve well in this transitional climate. The evening offers an excellent opportunity to gather with a small circle of friends, perhaps over a coffee or a glass of something warm as one reflects on the day’s simple pleasures. These moments become more precious when the air brings that fresh, nostalgic chill—reminding us that the crossover into spring is just around the corner, framing our present in shades of hope.
